review: The infinity pool is nice and the plants are well kept, but the zoo is appalling. Animals like crocodiles and snakes are kept poorly.
A beautiful mountain getaway with lots to do. The attractions, infinity pool, and food were great.
Unprofessional staff and management. Booked rooms were given to others despite prior confirmation.
Avoid this place. Very poor customer service. Manager lacks soft skills.
Room was not clean upon arrival.
No WiFi available which was disappointing.
Air conditioning was not working properly.
Nice place but service is slow.
